allow: PowerShell($packages = @\("@studio-freight/lenis", "framer-motion", "gsap", "react-hook-form", "@hookform/resolvers"\); foreach \($pkg in $packages\) { $path = "c:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Desktop\\my portfolio 2.0\\node_modules\\$pkg\\package.json"; if \(Test-Path $path\) { $v = \(Get-Content $path | ConvertFrom-Json\).version; Write-Output "$pkg@$v" } else { Write-Output "MISSING: $pkg" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/_next/static/chunks/app/page.js" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Page chunk loaded OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Page chunk error: $_" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Root page: $\($r2.StatusCode\) \($\($r2.Content.Length\) bytes\)"; if \($r2.Content -match "Something went wrong"\) { Write-Output "ERROR BOUNDARY TRIGGERED IN SSR" } else { Write-Output "No error in SSR HTML" } } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })
